allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\(r'C:/Users/ronal/Downloads/taxonomy.json'\)\); tree=d['tree']; print\('disciplines:', len\(tree\)\); print\('total prefixes:', sum\(len\(t.get\('children',[]\)\) for t in tree\)\)")

PowerShell($d = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\ronal\\Downloads\\taxonomy.json" | ConvertFrom-Json; $tree = $d.tree; "Disciplines: $\($tree.Count\)"; "Total prefixes: $\(\($tree | ForEach-Object { $_.children.Count } | Measure-Object -Sum\).Sum\)")
